name: Sniper : Killing Skibidi
description: Perfect Sniper 3D is a fun, addictive and extremely casual shooting game. Just aim at the target and shoot the Skibidi. You can also detonate explosives to kill Skibids. Enjoy!
instructions: Use mouse to play the game
tags: 3D, Hypercasual, Shooter, Shooting, Skibidi Toilet, Sniper
